penalties.description: The video shows tutorial content and branding screens but no actual task performance or timing information.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: This appears to be tutorial or instructional content from LapSim software rather than an actual task performance. The frames show only setup instructions, brief glimpses of the task environment, and branding screens. No timing information is visible, no clear task start or completion can be identified, and the ligating loop task requirements (loop placement, knot securing, tail cutting) are not demonstrated. Cannot determine completion time or assess task-specific penalties.
